# GitHub repository SEO settings (apply manually in repo Settings)

## Short description (About)
Production-grade cross-platform AI SSH terminal for SRE & DevOps, native Claude Code MCP integration, secure sudo, multi-hop jump host, SFTP remote file editor, no server-side agent, Windows/macOS/Linux desktop client
